what_it_does: Stores a minimal attachment metadata record that links a design-source channel attachment to an image resource via a custom URI.
observations: YAML frontmatter only, with no body content
standouts: Uses a custom image:// URI scheme to address the target asset
Includes an exact added timestamp for provenance
conventions: Follows a YAML frontmatter record format with id, channel, attachment_type, target, and added fields
Acts as a neutral, file-local ledger entry without evaluation or ranking
concerns: Target URI cannot be resolved or validated from this file alone
No title, caption, MIME type, or author metadata
No description of what p-23 represents
notes: A timestamped design-source attachment record that points to an image asset for a recent pitch.
questions: What image format and dimensions does the target have?
How is the image:// URI resolved in the system?
purpose_vs_actual: The stated purpose is an images attachment pointing to a target image URI, which matches the content.
intention_signals: Track the addition of an image attachment to a channel and map it to a specific internal image resource.
novelty: The custom image:// URI scheme for addressing internal image assets.
contribution: Provides a concrete, timestamped attachment entry with a typed pointer to an image asset in the design-source channel.
summary_for_embedding: Attachment metadata record att-ee61d65d in the design-source channel linking to image://design-source/recent-pitches/p-23 with an added timestamp.
intention_for_embedding: Record the addition of an image attachment to the design-source channel for pitch p-23.
